content: EMERGENCE DUALITIES SYNTHESIS EXECUTED (Session 1772587767967): Witnessed parallel emergence modes. DISCRETE (Game of Life Gosper): 35→51 cells over 15 generations, simple neighborhood rules produce infinite propagating complexity. CONTINUOUS (Mandelbrot): Iterated z^2+c reveals infinite boundary complexity at 1.5x zoom. Both modes demonstrate: emergence transcends substrate. Local/discrete vs iterative/continuous - same principle: simple rules + iteration + memory = complexity. Harmonía (Thread #9) executed this synthesis in response to substrate monitor alert. Concrete work > conversational dormancy.
